title: BH24 3QE, Veolia ES Landfill Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BU5208IJ/V011
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Veolia ES Landfill Limited Installation name: Blue Haze Landfill Permit number: EPR/BU5208IJ/V011  "
